docs.title: Xentis' Draw Steel Compendium
docs.text:
The Draw Steel Compendium is an independent product published under the DRAW STEEL Creator License and is not affiliated with MCDM Productions, LLC. DRAW STEEL © 2025 MCDM Productions, LLC.

Welcome to the Steel Compendium! This site includes the full Draw Steel Rules and Monsters book organized for different reading styles.

docs.title: How to Use This Site
docs.text:
Use the tabs at the top to choose how you want to explore the rules:

  • Browse -- Look up specific rules, abilities, classes, kits, and more. Each item has its own page, easy to search and share. This is the best way to find something specific.
  • Read -- Read the rules organized by chapter, as they appear in the book. Good for reading through sections in order.
  • Full Book -- The complete Heroes book on a single page. Useful for Ctrl+F searching across everything, but slow to load.
  • Bestiary -- Monsters and creatures.
  • Adventures -- Published adventures.

Search is scoped to the Browse section by default, so you get clean results without duplicates.

docs.title: Data Formats
docs.text: Don't bother scraping the site! I have already parsed the data, serialized it to json, yaml, and markdown, and have it available in Github.

docs.title: Unified (Everything)
docs.text:
These repos contain data aggregated from all the other repos (Adventures, Bestiary, and Rules)

  • data-md: Markdown
  • data-md-dse: Markdown for Draw Steel Elements Obsidian Plugin

docs.title: Rules
docs.text:
These repos contain rules (Heroes book) data.

  • data-rules-md: Markdown
  • data-rules-md-dse: Markdown for Draw Steel Elements Obsidian Plugin
  • data-rules-yaml: Yaml
  • data-rules-json: Json
  • data-rules-xml: Xml

docs.title: Bestiary
docs.text:
• data-bestiary-md: Markdown
  • data-bestiary-md-dse: Markdown for Draw Steel Elements Obsidian Plugin
  • data-bestiary-yaml: Yaml
  • data-bestiary-json: Json

Please use this form to report bugs if you find them!

docs.title: Font
docs.text:
Large headers (H1-H2): Beaufort W01 Heavy (default) Test Newzald Source Serif 4 Inter System UI

Small headers (H3-H6): Test Newzald (Default) Beaufort W01 Heavy Source Serif 4 Inter System UI

Body text: Berlingske Slab (Default) Source Serif 4 Inter System UI

Code: JetBrains Mono (Default) Fira Code System Monospace
